title: 10 medicinal preparations of Paeonia × suffruticosa (tree peony)

preparations_list.preparation_desc: Paeonia × suffruticosa teas is used to alleviate a variety of health issues. The tea has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine to treat anxiety and depression, as well as insomnia and restlessness. It is also believed to have anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in reducing fever and relieving symptoms associated with respiratory infections such as bronchitis and asthma. Additionally, the tea may help lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels, promoting overall cardiovascular health.

Paeonia × suffruticosa tinctures is used to alleviate a range of health issues. Traditionally, it has been employed to treat menstrual cramps, bloating, and other symptoms associated with PMS. The tincture's anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties make it effective in soothing digestive issues such as diarrhea, constipation, and abdominal pain. Additionally, its sedative properties can help alleviate anxiety and insomnia. Overall, Paeonia × suffruticosa tinctures offer a natural remedy for various health concerns.

Paeonia × suffruticosa decoctions is used to treat various health conditions, including arthritis, gout, and rheumatoid arthritis. The decoction is believed to have anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties, which help to relieve pain and reduce swelling in the affected joints. Additionally, it may be used to treat digestive issues such as diarrhea, constipation, and stomach ulcers, as well as respiratory problems like bronchitis and asthma.

Paeonia × suffruticosa capsules is used to promote overall health and wellness. The capsules have been traditionally used in traditional Chinese medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. They are believed to help alleviate symptoms of fever, sore throat, and respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Additionally, the capsules may also help to reduce stress and anxiety by promoting relaxation and improving sleep quality.

Paeonia × suffruticosa tablets is used to alleviate various health issues. The tablets have been traditionally used in Chinese medicine to treat respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as digestive issues like diarrhea and constipation. Additionally, it has anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce fever and relieve pain. Its antioxidant properties also make it useful for skincare and haircare, promoting healthy aging and reducing inflammation.

Paeonia × suffruticosa syrups is used to alleviate various health issues. The syrup is believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating respiratory problems such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds. It is also used to soothe digestive issues like constipation, diarrhea, and gastritis. Additionally, the syrup has been traditionally used to treat skin conditions like eczema, acne, and wounds due to its antimicrobial properties.

Paeonia × suffruticosa poultices is used to alleviate various health issues. The poultice has anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, cuts, and burns. It can also be applied topically to relieve pain and reduce swelling for conditions such as arthritis, gout, and sprains. Additionally, tree peony poultices have been used traditionally to treat skin conditions like eczema, acne, and dermatitis.

Paeonia × suffruticosa ointments is used to alleviate various health issues. It has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help soothe skin irritations, wounds, and burns. The ointment can also be used to treat eczema, acne, and other skin conditions. Additionally, it may help reduce pain and swelling in muscles and joints, making it a potential natural remedy for arthritis and other musculoskeletal disorders.

Paeonia × suffruticosa creams is used to alleviate various health concerns. The creams have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which help soothe skin irritations, wounds, and burns. They are also used to treat acne, eczema, and dermatitis. Additionally, the creams have been shown to improve blood circulation, reduce pain and swelling, and even support wound healing. Overall, Paeonia × suffruticosa creams offer a natural and effective solution for promoting overall skin health and well-being.

Paeonia × suffruticosa salves is used to alleviate various health issues. These salves are made by infusing the flowers of Paeonia × suffruticosa in oil and have been traditionally used to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and burns. The anti-inflammatory properties of these salves can help reduce pain and swelling, while also promoting wound healing. Additionally, they may be used to calm anxiety and stress-related issues, making them a natural remedy for overall well-being.

intro: Paeonia × suffruticosa has several medicinal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and dried roots. These preparations are useful for alleviating symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The tea is often consumed to soothe menstrual cramps, while the tincture can be used to treat anxiety and insomnia. Additionally, the dried root is sometimes employed in traditional Chinese medicine to treat respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma.
intro_desc: Paeonia × suffruticosa has several medicinal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions. These preparations are useful for relieving anxiety and insomnia, as well as soothing menstrual cramps and other gynecological issues. The plant's root is also used to make salves and creams for skin irritations and wounds, while its flowers are used to make a sedative tea. The root and flowers are also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
